content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 7, 0), (0, 2, 3), (1, 3, 4), (1, 4, 5), (1, 2, 7), (7, 9, 9), (2, 5, 10), (2, 9, 11), (4, 5, 13), (3, 7, 16), (0, 1, 18), (1, 6, 18), (3, 9, 18), (7, 8, 18), (3, 6, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 0.

After scanning each edge, we have the following matches:

* Edge (0, 2, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 3, 4) has node 1 and time 4. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 4, 5) has node 1 and time 5. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 2, 7) has node 1 and time 7. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (7, 9, 9) has node 7 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 5, 10) has node 2 and time 10. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 9, 11) has node 2 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 7, 16) has node 3 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 1, 18) has node 0 and time 18. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (1, 6, 18) has node 1 and time 18. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 9, 18) has node 3 and time 18. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 8, 18) has node 7 and time 18. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 6, 19) has node 3 and time 19. -> Add node 6.

The nodes matched are 2, 3, 4, 5, 9, and 18.

Answer: [2, 3, 4, 5, 9, 18]
